_comment: Remote code-index MCP (Streamable HTTP) for whalecloud-dev-tool-rule-create optional Phase 2 index cross-check.
_usage: Replace the url with your serve origin + /api/mcp. fetch-arch-data.js accepts --with-snippets for symbol bodies in arch-data.json.

_placeholders.GITNEXUS_URL: http://127.0.0.1:11011 — 与 `gitnexus serve` 暴露的 HTTP API 同源（勿与仅用于浏览的 Web 端口混淆）
